title: Mega Showdown Repolished [Cobblemon: Mega Showdown]
description: A simple pack that re-sprites the Mega Stones included in Cobblemon: Mega Showdown and Navas' ZAmega. Now aiming to Repolish most of the textures present in Mega Showdown.
body:
# Mega Showdown Repolished
A complete retexture to all the currently added Mega Stones in Cobblemon: Mega Showdown and Navas' ZAmega.

Now aiming to Repolish most of the textures present in Cobblemon: Mega Showdown.


 
![everything](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/708c089066adca244adbd5b7492001992413ac96.png)
![type plates](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f652c7f1cec40857d1871bb6c0c9838fa34f029.gif)
